artifact: Join event to budget to expense for the specified October Meeting and list approval flags.
sql: SELECT ex.expense_id, ex.expense_description, ex.expense_date, ex.approved FROM event AS e JOIN budget AS b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event JOIN expense AS ex ON b.budget_id = ex.link_to_budget WHERE e.event_name = 'October Meeting' AND e.event_date = DATE '2019-10-08';

raw_response.sql: SELECT ex.expense_id, ex.expense_description, ex.expense_date, ex.approved FROM event AS e JOIN budget AS b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event JOIN expense AS ex ON b.budget_id = ex.link_to_budget WHERE e.event_name = 'October Meeting' AND e.event_date = DATE '2019-10-08';
raw_response.artifact: Join event to budget to expense for the specified October Meeting and list approval flags.
